description: GPU-compute anchor. Start with GPU tile frequency; add CPU package PL1 as an indirect budget split check.

knobs.name: GPU_CORE_FREQUENCY_MAX_CONTROL
knobs.reason: Primary writable GPU lever on Aurora because GPU power cap itself is not writable.

knobs.name: CPU_POWER_LIMIT_CONTROL
knobs.reason: Indirect GPU budget experiment under board cap: reduce CPU share when GPU does the work.
